hero.name: Jhon Pillaca
hero.bio: +5 years building scalable web applications with Angular, NestJS, and Spring Boot. Passionate about AI, automation, and building solutions with real impact.

about.title: Professional Profile
about.lead: Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience, specialized in Angular, NestJS, Spring Boot, and Artificial Intelligence solutions.
about.body: Proactive, self-taught, and driven to build projects with real-world impact. I am passionate about process automation, AI agents, and designing scalable architectures to solve complex problems.

tasks: Active development of Codex (an enterprise multi-tenant platform built on a microservices and Angular microfrontends architecture) and Zentra (a clinical and operational system utilizing NestJS, Next.js, and AI agents).
Design and construction of the gco-ui-library component library in Angular to standardize modular visual components across the frontend ecosystem.
Integration of Supabase for authentication and database management. Advanced administration of MongoDB and PostgreSQL.
Development of AI agents using Model Context Protocol (MCP) and integration of LLMs for workflow automation.
Development of the JLH insurance brokerage platform integrating OCR, RAG, MLL, and Python scripts for policy processing.
Development of multi-tenant accounting software using Angular for the frontend and Spring Boot for the backend.
Construction of REST APIs and optimization of complex queries in MySQL.
Development of reusable components in Angular and integration with REST APIs.
Design of responsive web interfaces using HTML5 and CSS.
User interface design and web development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript under SCRUM methodology.

list.title: Codex
list.desc: An enterprise multi-tenant platform and infrastructure built on microservices and microfrontends, featuring the integration of the gco-ui-library component library and a modular administration shell in Angular.

list.title: Zentra
list.desc: A modern clinical and operational system with onboarding modules, patient management, interactive billing, and smart automations powered by AI agents. Developed with NestJS microservices and Next.js frontend.

list.title: GCO UI Library
list.desc: An enterprise Angular component library (gco-ui-library) based on front/gco-ui-library, including interactive documentation (gco-ui-docs). Features buttons, tables, reactive forms with validation, modals, and customizable themes.

list.title: JLH Corredores Seguros
list.desc: A comprehensive insurance platform with a robust database and advanced AI capabilities for OCR policy analysis, RAG on coverage documentation, automated AI agents, and Multimodal Language Models (MLL).

list.title: AI Agents with MCP
list.desc: Development of artificial intelligence agents using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for business process automation. Integration with OpenAI APIs and RAG systems.

list.title: Lidera Software
list.desc: A multi-tenant accounting software for corporate financial control. Built with an Angular frontend, a Spring Boot backend, and a scalable multi-tenant MySQL database architecture for secure data isolation.

list.title: Master's Degree in Full-Stack Web Development
Associate Degree in Computer Science
list.institution: IESTP "María Rosario Araoz Pinto" — Web Design, OOP, Databases, Agile Methodologies
